special_mechanics.name: Flying sequences
special_mechanics.description: Occasionally players take flight for side-scrolling flying and shooting sequences. Iron Man and Vision fly on their own, while Captain America and Hawkeye use flying machines.

special_mechanics.name: Character-specific jump attacks
special_mechanics.description: During a jump, Captain America and Hawkeye can attack with a flying kick, while Iron Man and Vision instead attack by firing their energy beams at a 45-degree angle.

special_mechanics.name: Avenger Attack special
special_mechanics.description: Each character uses a ranged special attack - either a projectile weapon (Captain America's shield and Hawkeye's arrows) or an energy beam (Iron Man and Vision), known as that character's 'Avenger Attack'.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay overview but no specific physics parameters, movement speeds, gravity values, or sub-pixel precision data. Information is limited to mechanical descriptions and feature overview.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Captain America and the Avengers
